title: Settings
placeholderMessage: This feature will be added later.

items.ownerOnlySubtitle: Only the build owner can change this.
items.subscriptionLockedSubtitle: The build owner pays for the subscription.

report.title: Report a problem
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe exactly what happened, where in the app it occurred, and when the issue appeared...

alerts.minLength: Please describe the problem with at least 10 characters.
alerts.sent: Your report has been sent. We will reply as soon as possible.
alerts.sendFailed: Failed to send the report. Please try again.
alerts.savedLocalDemo: Your report has been saved locally (demo).

report.hintDemo: This is a demo version. Later we will connect Supabase Storage or a webhook.

appSettings.title: App settings

notif.disableMessage: To disable notifications, go to your phone settings.

appSettings.partnerReadOnlyNotice: As a partner, you cannot change currency or units. These settings belong to the build owner.

password.title: Change password
password.subtitle: Update your account password
password.modalSubtitle: Password must be at least 8 characters long
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Permanently delete all data
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: This cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: Failed to delete account. Please contact support.

subscription.title: Choose a subscription
subscription.subtitle: Manage your build without limits
subscription.savingsNote: Paying upfront saves you over 40% per year

partner.title: Build partner
partner.heroSubtitle: Generate an invite code and decide what your partner can see or add in your build.
partner.lockedSubtitle: To generate a partner invite, you need an active Expert plan.

view.label: View only
view.title: Read access only
view.text: The partner can see the build but cannot add anything new.
view.summaryText: Budget and documents are visible. Adding new entries stays disabled.

collab.label: Collaboration
collab.title: Can add items
collab.text: The partner can add photos, entries and expenses.
collab.summaryText: The partner can add photos, journal entries and expenses. They cannot mark progress or edit existing data.

partner.inviteHint: Share this code with your partner. The code is single-use and valid for 14 days.
partner.revokeMessage: This code will stop working immediately. The partner will need a new code.
partner.convertAction: Yes, delete my build and join
partner.convertWarningMessage: You already have your own build on this account. If you join as a partner, we will delete your current build and its data: budget, documents, photos, journal, tasks and project. This action cannot be undone.
partner.leaveMessage: After leaving, you will lose access to the build you were invited to. The account will stay active.

partnerMode.title: You are a build partner
partnerMode.message: You have access to a shared build. You can leave partner access and return to a normal account.

partner.partnerListMeta: The partner mode is fixed. To change access, remove the partner and send a new invite.

view.title: Mode: view only
view.text: A good choice when you want to share information without risking accidental changes.

bullets.budget: Full view of budget, documents and tasks
bullets.progress: Ideal for checking progress and keeping up to date
bullets.noAdds: No adding photos, documents, entries or expenses

collab.title: Mode: active collaboration
collab.text: The strongest collaboration setup for a partner who will actively help with the build.

bullets.adds: Can add photos, documents, entries and expenses
bullets.tasks: Tasks are available on both sides
bullets.ownerControl: Budget, documents and progress stay under owner control

partner.removeMessage: This person will lose access to the build immediately.
partner.removedTitle: You were removed from the build
partner.removedMessage: You were removed from the build and are returning to a normal account.
partner.removedMessageNamed: You were removed from build "{{name}}" and are returning to a normal account.
partner.note: At this stage the partner is added without a separate payment. We will move data to a shared build model module by module to avoid regressions.

errors.copyInvite: Failed to copy the invite code.
errors.convert: Failed to move this account to partner mode.
errors.revoke: Failed to revoke the invite code.

view_budget.title: Budget view
view_budget.subtitle: Partner can see costs and summaries.

view_documents.title: Document view
view_documents.subtitle: Partner can see documents added to the build.

add_photos.title: Add photos
add_photos.subtitle: Partner can document progress with photos.

add_journal.title: Journal entries
add_journal.subtitle: Partner can add notes from the build.

manage_tasks.title: Tasks
manage_tasks.subtitle: Partner can create and update tasks.

intro.title: Invite a partner to your build
intro.subtitle: Share the build with another person at no extra charge. Your partner helps document progress while you control their permissions.

sharedBuild.title: One build, two people
sharedBuild.subtitle: A shared project, progress and key information in one place.

documentation.title: Documentation without chaos
documentation.subtitle: Your partner can add photos and entries when you are not on site.

permissions.title: Safe permissions
permissions.subtitle: You decide whether your partner sees the budget, documents and tasks.

conflict.title: You already have an active role
conflict.message: You cannot join as a partner and create your own build at the same time. Leave the current build first or use another account.
